surface: Flow Validator Guidance: MCP HTTP + Remote

assertionsTested.reason: Namespace-scoped auth bootstrap and authenticated remote read precondition succeeded on local worker using utv-adisc-cross@example.com and namespace adisc-cross.
evidence: GET /spikes with Bearer token returned namespaced fixture: page=adisc-cross-remote-1773172918.html, comments=adisc-cross-marker-1773172918

assertionsTested.reason: MCP HTTP session flow worked end-to-end in remote mode: initialize returned session id, notifications/initialized returned 202, and tools/list returned tool catalog.
evidence: curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3867/ (initialize) -> HTTP/1.1 200 OK, header mcp-session-id: 1c475695-f7db-4e7b-bd81-ee018dee58bf, SSE body contains serverInfo.name=spikes-mcp
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3867/ -H 'Mcp-Session-Id: 1c475695-f7db-4e7b-bd81-ee018dee58bf' --data notifications/initialized -> HTTP/1.1 202 Accepted
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3867/ -H 'Mcp-Session-Id: 1c475695-f7db-4e7b-bd81-ee018dee58bf' --data tools/list -> HTTP/1.1 200 OK

assertionsTested.reason: Remote tools output matched namespaced seeded data and discovery tool surface was present in tools/list.
evidence: tools/list SSE response included 9 tools; computed summary: {"tool_count":9,"required_discovery_tools_present":true} for create_share/list_shares/get_usage
curl tools/call get_spikes with page=adisc-cross-remote-1773172918.html -> SSE text: 'Found 1 spike(s)' with '[ee0a5630]' and 'Comments: adisc-cross-marker-1773172918'

assertionsTested.reason: Remote-mode network failure path returns protocol error object (not false success) when API endpoint is unreachable.
evidence: { printf initialize; printf notifications/initialized; printf tools/call; } | SPIKES_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9 SPIKES_TOKEN=<scoped> spikes mcp serve --remote
stdout JSON-RPC snippet: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"error":{"code":-32603,"message":"Connection failed. Check your internet connection."}}

frictions: CLI output masking hid raw login token in direct curl output; resolved by using command-scoped python bootstrap to exchange login token and persist bearer to isolated /tmp namespace workspace without printing secrets.
summary: Validated 4/4 assigned assertions (VAL-CROSS-001,002,003,006) as pass using namespace adisc-cross on local worker and MCP remote surfaces; initialize/initialized/tools/list/tools/call and unreachable-network error behavior all matched expected contract outcomes.
